zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter de Beauchamp於大約1364年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾時，他的父親Sir John de Beauchamp36歲，母親Joan de Cherlelton31歲。他和Elizabeth Roche至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1430年1月1日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾波維其可享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter de Beauchamp于大约1364年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Sir John de Beauchamp36岁，母亲Joan de Cherlelton31岁。他和Elizabeth Roche至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1430年1月1日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾波維其可享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter de Beauchamp was born about 1364, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John de Beauchamp, was 36 and his mother, Joan de Cherlelton, was 31. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Elizabeth Roche. He died on 1 January 1430, in Powick, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter de Beauchamp est né environ 1364, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Beauchamp, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Joan de Cherlelton, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Elizabeth Roche. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1430, à Powick, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter de Beauchamp um 1364 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Beauchamp 36 und seine Mutter Joan de Cherlelton 31. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Roche mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. Januar 1430 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Powick, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter de Beauchamp è nato il circa 1364 nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John de Beauchamp, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Cherlelton, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Elizabeth Roche. Morì il 1 gennaio 1430, nel Powick, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter de Beauchampが約1364年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John de Beauchampは36歳，母Joan de Cherleltonは31歳であった。彼はElizabeth Rocheとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1430年1月1日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアポウィックで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter de Beauchamp(이)가 대략 1364년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Beauchamp(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Cherlelton(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Roche(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1430년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 파윅에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter de Beauchamp nasceu aproximadamente 1364, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Beauchamp, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Cherlelton, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Elizabeth Roche. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1430, em Powick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter de Beauchamp родился около 1364 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John de Beauchamp было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Cherlelton, 31. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Elizabeth Roche. Он умер 1 января 1430 г. в местности поуикк, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter de Beauchamp nació aproximadamente 1364, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Beauchamp, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Joan de Cherlelton, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Elizabeth Roche. Murió el 1 de enero de 1430, en Powick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
